query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `lender_config` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` text NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(32),
  `company` text,
  `nmls` varchar(64),
  `introEmailSubject` text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Investor Introduction — STR Financing',
  `introEmailBody` text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Hi {lenderName},\n\nI wanted to introduce you to {investorName}, an investor I spoke with today who is exploring STR financing options.\n\nFinancing Type: {financingType}\nBudget: {budget}\nTimeline: {timeline}\n\nPlease feel free to reach out directly. I''ve CC''d {investorName} on this email.\n\nBest,\n{isaName}',
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
